mechanics.excerpt: The following are the dominant religions, with the greatest numbers of followers Christianity Christianity has survived in many forms_ The schism 0f 2772 gave rise to a ffshoot of Roman Catholic orthodoxy; the New Avalon Catholic Church; which House Davion supports as wav promote patriotism in Federated Suns space. The Combine less enthusiastic about Christianity but permits it as long as remains small and quiet.
